# SitePulse
> Automated SEO audit and reporting platform for digital agencies.

SitePulse helps digital agencies run automated SEO audits, generate white-label PDF reports, and share results with clients via magic-link dashboards — no login required for clients.

## Key Features
- Automated website SEO audits
- White-label PDF report generation
- Client-facing dashboards via magic links
- Google Search Console & GA4 integration
- Plain-English AI-rewritten audit summaries
- 14-day free trial, then paid plans

## Pages
- /: Landing page and free scan tool
- /pricing: Pricing plans for agencies
- /dashboard: Agency dashboard (auth required)

## Contact
https://www.trysitepulse.com
